title: OPINION: Alaska can’t ditch RINO legislators if conservative candidates don’t challenge

title: State Stories
summary: NASS releases state stories...

title: Upcoming Events: Avalanche Rescue, Free Snowpack Talk and more
summary: Check out our Calendar tab above for upcoming events!! A wide range of events are on tap, from our final Fireside Chat on Snowpack and Weather, Free Avalanche Rescue workshops on Turnagain Pass and more. Even though the snowpack is thin at the lower elevations, we are still moving ahead with our han...

title: No snow down low, but it is slowly getting deeper up high!
summary: Keep doing your snow dances!! Although there is little snow at the Turnagain Pass road elevation, it has been snowing quite a bit in the upper elevations! Make sure to check the daily advisory if you are headed out in search of the white stuff.

title: “The Unrideables: Alaska Range” Special Screening!
summary: Keep the winter stoke alive and join the Friends of the CNFAIC and the Alaska Avalanche School at a special screening of Red Bull's "Unrideables: Alaska Range" Thursday night March 13th! Click the link above for more details.

title: Hatcher Pass Observations
summary: The Chugach National Forest Avalanche Information Center and Friends of the Chugach Avalanche Center are pleased to announce the launch of an observations program partnership with Hatcher Pass Avalanche Center. Our hope is that Hatcher Pass users will embrace the observations program in the same way...

title: Annual CNFAIC Fundraiser – Nov 16th at the Beartooth Theater Pub!!
summary: Don't miss Mark and Janelle Smiley at the Beartooth on Thursday, Nov 16th for the Annual CNFAIC fundraiser!! This husband-wife duo has spent the last seven years climbing the “50 Classic Climbs of North America”. Their presentation will feature incredible footage and stories from four of their journ...

title: What events are happening in your neighborhood this Holiday season?
summary: Check out our Calendar Page for upcoming events, workshops and avalanche courses.
